name: expo-toolkit
description: RN+Expo toolkit: skills (UI kit, payments, observability, dev scripts, release discipline), project-tuned reviewer agents, convention-enforcing hooks, and orchestration commands. Authority-led — complements building-native-ui, react-native-best-practices, tanstack-query-best-practices, native-data-fetching, RevenueCat:*, expo-deployment, expo-cicd-workflows, eas-update-insights.
